product: Lakebase Autoscaling updates: OAuth role management, budget policies and tags…
tagline: Lakebase Autoscaling now includes the following features: OAuth roles: Create OAuth roles using the Lakebase UI or REST API, in addition to SQL.
what_it_does: Lakebase Autoscaling now includes the following features: OAuth roles: Create OAuth roles using the Lakebase UI or REST API, in addition to SQL. Budget policies and tags: Associate a serverless budget policy and add custom tags to your project for cost attribution and tracking. Lakehouse sync (Beta): Continuously replicate Lakebase Postgres tables to Unity Catalog Delta tables using CDC.
why_it_matters: Budget policies and tags: Associate a serverless budget policy and add custom tags to your project for cost attribution and tracking.
